title: rubus pinnatisepalus
intro: Rubus pinnatisepalus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan bramble, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family native to the Himalayan region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Rubus pinnatisepalus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine in Asia, particularly in Ayurvedic and Unani practices.
